summary: Iteration 51 - Brand/UX Refinement Testing Complete. All Herion logo integrations verified across welcome page (nav, hero), login page, register page, and dashboard sidebar. Welcome page completely rewritten with 7 sections: Hero (emotional messaging), Value Blocks (4 blocks), Flow Steps, Before/After, Chi Siamo (with principle quote), Per Chi e Herion (3 cards), Final CTA (dark background), and Footer. Bilingual IT/EN switch working correctly. Mobile responsiveness (375px) verified with no overflow. Favicon updated to Herion logo.

details.welcome_nav: ✓ HerionBrand with /herion-logo.png visible in nav bar

details.hero_section: ✓ Emotional messaging about tax procedure complexity ('labirinto'/'maze')
details.before_after_section: ✓ Prima di Herion / Dopo Herion visible
details.about_section: ✓ Chi siamo with Herion principle quote
details.consultation_section: ✓ Per chi e Herion with 3 cards (Freelancer/Azienda/Privato)

details.italian_content: ✓ Default Italian content ('Le procedure fiscali non dovrebbero essere un labirinto')
details.english_content: ✓ English content after switch ('Tax procedures shouldn't be a maze')

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all brand integration and welcome page features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified all brand integration features. Logo file is /app/frontend/public/herion-logo.png (695KB PNG). HerionLogo.jsx exports: HerionBrand (nav/sidebar), HerionHeroLogo (hero), HerionIcon (small), HerionMark, HerionMarkLight (footer/CTA). Welcome page sections have data-testids: hero-section, value-section, flow-section, before-after-section, about-section, consultation-section, cta-section, footer. Language switcher uses data-testid='language-switcher', 'lang-switch-it', 'lang-switch-en'.
